comments: Drake (presumed 4cy) off east side of beach during the afternoon, strongly associating with Eiders in same way as individual previously seen in Firth of Forth in 2025. Distinct brown flanks, pinkish bill colouration (not extending as far towards the gape as Velvet Scoter), distinct bulged head profile (not concave as would be in Velvet Scoter). Eye tick not as pronounced as would be in a full adult plumage, although more developed since last sighting and still more extensive than typical Velvet. Ended up roosting on rocks with Eiders at high tide.
one in woods along track south of Auldhame Reservoir
